name: Amoxicillin
description: I-Broad-spectrum aminopenicillin amayeza okubulala iintsholongwane. I-Oral prophylactic antibiotics yosulelo lwenxeba. Inxalenye ye-TCCC yokulwa neepilisi ipakethe ye-nxeba prophylaxis kukulimala okungamanduleli.
indications: Iprophylaxis yosulelo lwamanxeba (amanxeba aphakathi, iipilisi zomlomo)
dose: I-500 mg PO rhoqo kwiiyure ze-8 x iintsuku ze-7 (i-nxeba prophylaxis). I-875 mg PO nganye kwiiyure ze-12 enye.
window: Qalisa kwiiyure ze-3 zokulimala kwi-nxeba prophylaxis.
contraindications: Ukwaliwa yipenicillin okwaziwayo (sebenzisa idoxycycline endaweni yoko)
warnings: Ukuba i-penicillin iyalamba: endaweni ye-doxycycline 100mg PO BID.
Indlela yomlomo kuphela -- sebenzisa i-IV antibiotics (cefazolin/ciprofloxacin) kumanxeba amabi okanye ukuba umlomo awunyamezelwa.

pediatric.dose: I-25-45 mg / kg / ngosuku ihlukaniswe i-q8h (ubuninzi be-500 mg / umthamo). Sebenzisa ireferensi yeBrowselow esekwe kubunzima.

obstetric.note: Ikhuselekile ekukhulelweni. Ikhethwa ngaphezu kwe-doxycycline (echaswa ekukhulelweni).

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
